title: Matthew Florence Outage EDA

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Outage
text: Script name: Large Hurricane Analysis - Outage Project name: ADRD Hurricane Exposure Program description: Outage measure calculation 15 previously selected large hurricanes. hurricanes 2014 available outage data. Number customers without electricity collected EAGLE-. County-level electric customer estimates generating adding census business survey ACS5 population estimates county normalizing state-wide energy customer estimates Energy Information Administration. Data: EAGLE-outage data Census Business Survey ACS 5 - tidycensus package EIA State Customer Estimates HURDAT2 - get storm dates 2010 ZCTA County Relationships Restrictions: Outline program/analysis: Specify storms Download process hurdat2 tracks Extract outage data dates specified HURDAT2 plus 2 days Calculate outage estimates maximum percentage customers without electricity average duration outages Crosswalk county estimates ZCTA using 2010 ZCTA County Relationship file Author: Ryan Zomorrodi Revisions Input files files downloaded using R functions Cache stored raw-data\eaglei Output files tract/{storm id}/outage.csv zcta/{storm id}/outage.csv Start Time following hurricanes selected.
code: start_time <- Sys.time() cat(start_time, "\n") library(exposur) library(tidyverse) library(tigris) library(sf) hur_info <- readRDS( "raw-data/RF1_Hurricanes.rds") # get fips codes for each state fips_codes <- distinct(tigris::fips_codes, state, state_code) hur_info$fips <- pmap(hur_info, function(states, ...) {   fips_codes$state_code[match(states, fips_codes$state)] })

what: Get hurdat2 info for each storm
title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Outage
code: exposur:::download_newest_hurdat2(path = "raw-data/hurdat2")  hur_info$hurdat2 <- pmap(hur_info, function(hurricane, ...){   hurdat  <- get_hurdat2(     storm_id = hurricane,     path = "raw-data/hurdat2"   )      list(     start_date = min(hurdat$datetime),     end_date = max(hurdat$datetime),     hurdat = hurdat   ) }) hur_info <- unnest_wider(hur_info, hurdat2)

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Outage
code: hur_info$eaglei <- pmap(hur_info, function(start_date, end_date, ...) {   if (year(start_date) < 2014) {     return(list(NULL))   }    get_eaglei(     interval = interval(start_date, end_date + days(2)),     path = "raw-data/eaglei"   ) })

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Outage
code: hur_info$outage <- pmap(hur_info, function(eaglei, fips, start_date, ...) {   if (year(start_date) < 2014) {     return(list(NULL))   }    calc_outage(eaglei, fips) })  pwalk(hur_info, function(outage, hurricane, start_date, ...) {   if (year(start_date) >= 2014) {     write_csv(outage, str_c("tract/", hurricane, "/outage.csv"))   } })

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Outage
text: End Time
code: zcta_to_county <- read_csv("https://www2.census.gov/geo/docs/maps-data/data/rel/zcta_county_rel_10.txt") %>%   mutate(geoid_z = str_c(STATE, ZCTA5)) %>%   mutate(geoid_c = str_c(STATE, COUNTY))  outages <- Sys.glob("tract/*/outage.csv") %>%   map(function(outage_path) {     outage <- read_csv(outage_path, col_types = cols(geoid = col_character()))          outage %>%       left_join(zcta_to_county, join_by(geoid == geoid_c)) %>%       group_by(geoid_z) %>%       summarise(         max_pct_out_xwalk = sum(ZPOPPCT * max_pct_out) / 100,         avg_customer_hrs_out_xwalk = sum(ZPOPPCT * avg_customer_hrs_out) / 100       )          outage %>%       write_csv(str_replace(outage_path, "tract", "zcta"))   }) end_time <- Sys.time() cat("End time: ", end_time, "\n") cat("Duration: ", start_time - end_time, "\n")

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Precipitation
text: Script name: Large Hurricane Analysis - Precipitation Project name: ADRD Hurricane Exposure Program description: Amount precipitation calculated every day specified within HURDAT2 plus additional 2 days . nClimGrid raster data used calculate areal mean precipitation tracts/zctas. Data: HURDAT2 - get storm dates nClimGrid-Daily Restrictions: Outline program/analysis: Specify storms Download process hurdat2 tracks Download nClimGrid data duration storm plus 2 days Calculate areal mean precipitation Author: Ryan Zomorrodi Revisions Input files files downloaded using R functions Cache stored raw-data\nClimGrid Output files tract/{storm id}/daily_prcp.csv zcta/{storm id}/daily_prcp.csv Mean areal precipitation (mm) specified geoid tract Note: may NAs small number coastline tract entirely covered nClimGrid following hurricanes selected.
code: library(exposur) library(tidyverse) library(tigris) library(sf) hur_info <- readRDS( "raw-data/RF1_Hurricanes.rds") # get fips codes for each state fips_codes <- distinct(tigris::fips_codes, state, state_code) hur_info$fips <- pmap(hur_info, function(states, ...) {   fips_codes$state_code[match(states, fips_codes$state)] })

what: Get hurdat2 info for each storm
title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Precipitation
code: exposur:::download_newest_hurdat2(path = "raw-data/hurdat2")  hur_info$hurdat2 <- pmap(hur_info, function(hurricane, ...){   hurdat  <- get_hurdat2(     storm_id = hurricane,     path = "raw-data/hurdat2"   )      list(     start_date = min(hurdat$datetime),     end_date = max(hurdat$datetime),     hurdat = hurdat   ) }) hur_info <- unnest_wider(hur_info, hurdat2)

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Precipitation
code: hur_info$tracts_sf <- pmap(hur_info, function(start_date, fips, ...) {   tracts_list <- map(fips,      ~ tracts(state = .x, year = 2010, cb = TRUE)   )   bind_rows(tracts_list) %>%     mutate(GEOID = str_sub(GEO_ID, -11)) %>% # get tract geoids     filter(!st_is_empty(.)) %>% # remove tracts with empty geographies     st_transform(4326) %>% # transform to WGS 84     rename(geoid = GEOID) })  hur_info$zctas_sf <- pmap(hur_info, function(start_date, fips, ...) {   zctas_list <- map(fips,      ~ zctas(state = .x, year = 2010, cb = FALSE)   )   bind_rows(zctas_list) %>%     filter(!st_is_empty(.)) %>% # remove zctas with empty geographies     st_transform(4326) %>%     rename(geoid = GEOID10) })

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Precipitation
code: hur_info$nClimGrid <- pmap(hur_info, function(start_date, end_date, ...) {   get_nClimGrid(     interval = interval(start_date, end_date + days(2)),     path = "raw-data/nClimGrid"   )["prcp"] })

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Precipitation
text: End Time
code: hur_info$tract_prcp_daily_avg <- pmap(hur_info, function(nClimGrid, tracts_sf, ...) {   calc_daily_avgs(     nClimGrid = nClimGrid,     geography = tracts_sf,     geoid = "geoid"   ) })  pwalk(hur_info, function(tract_prcp_daily_avg, hurricane, ...) {   write_csv(tract_prcp_daily_avg, str_c("tract/", hurricane, "/daily_prcp.csv")) })  hur_info$zcta_prcp_daily_avg <- pmap(hur_info, function(nClimGrid, zctas_sf, ...) {   calc_daily_avgs(     nClimGrid = nClimGrid,     geography = zctas_sf,     geoid = "geoid"   ) })  pwalk(hur_info, function(zcta_prcp_daily_avg, hurricane, ...) {   write_csv(zcta_prcp_daily_avg, str_c("zcta/", hurricane, "/daily_prcp.csv")) }) end_time <- Sys.time() cat("End time: ", end_time, "\n") cat("Duration: ", start_time - end_time, "\n")

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance and Wind
text: Script name: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance Wind Project name: ADRD Hurricane Exposure Program description: Maximum wind calculated tract using stormwindmodel published Anderson geocentroid tract/zcta. Data: HURDAT2 Restrictions: Outline program/analysis: Specify storms Download process hurdat2 tracks Calculate geo-centroid tract/zcta Utilize stormwindmodel produce wind exposure estimates Output imputed track geojsons visualization Author: Ryan Zomorrodi Revisions Input files files downloaded using R functions Cache stored raw-data\hurdat2 Output files tract/{storm_id}/distance_wind.csv zcta/{storm_id}/distance_wind.csv tract/{storm_id}/track_line.geojson zcta/{storm_id}/track_line.geojson tract/{storm_id}/track_points.geojson zcta/{storm_id}/track_points.geojson Start Time following hurricanes selected.
code: start_time <- Sys.time() cat(start_time, "\n") library(exposur) library(tidyverse) library(tigris) library(sf) hur_info <- readRDS( "raw-data/RF1_Hurricanes.rds") # get fips codes for each state fips_codes <- distinct(tigris::fips_codes, state, state_code) hur_info$fips <- pmap(hur_info, function(states, ...) {   fips_codes$state_code[match(states, fips_codes$state)] })

what: Get hurdat2 info for each storm
title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance and Wind
code: exposur:::download_newest_hurdat2(path = "raw-data/hurdat2")  hur_info$hurdat2 <- pmap(hur_info, function(hurricane, ...){   hurdat  <- get_hurdat2(     storm_id = hurricane,     path = "raw-data/hurdat2"   )      list(     start_date = min(hurdat$datetime),     end_date = max(hurdat$datetime),     hurdat = hurdat   ) }) hur_info <- unnest_wider(hur_info, hurdat2)

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance and Wind
code: hur_info$tracts_sf <- pmap(hur_info, function(start_date, fips, ...) {   tracts_list <- map(fips,      ~ tracts(state = .x, year = 2010, cb = TRUE)   )   bind_rows(tracts_list) %>%     mutate(GEOID = str_sub(GEO_ID, -11)) %>% # get tract geoids     filter(!st_is_empty(.)) %>% # remove tracts with empty geographies     st_transform(4326) %>% # transform to WGS 84     rename(geoid = GEOID) %>%     st_centroid() # get geo-centroid of each tract })  hur_info$zctas_sf <- pmap(hur_info, function(start_date, fips, ...) {   zctas_list <- map(fips,      ~ zctas(state = .x, year = 2010, cb = FALSE)   )   bind_rows(zctas_list) %>%     filter(!st_is_empty(.)) %>% # remove zctas with empty geographies     st_transform(4326) %>%     rename(geoid = GEOID10) %>%     st_centroid() # get geo-centroid of each zctas })

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance and Wind
code: hur_info$track <- pmap(hur_info, function(hurdat, ...) {   calc_interpolated_track(hurdat) })  pwalk(hur_info, function(track, hurricane, ...) {   st_write(track, str_c("tract/", hurricane, "/track_points.geojson"))      track %>%     st_combine() %>%     st_cast("LINESTRING") %>%     st_write(str_c("tract/", hurricane, "/track_line.geojson")) })  pwalk(hur_info, function(track, hurricane, ...) {   st_write(track, str_c("zcta/", hurricane, "/track_points.geojson"))      track %>%     st_combine() %>%     st_cast("LINESTRING") %>%     st_write(str_c("zcta/", hurricane, "/track_line.geojson")) })

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance and Wind
code: hur_info$tract_closest_dist <- pmap(hur_info, function(track, tracts_sf, ...) {   calc_closest_dist(track, tracts_sf, geoid = "geoid") })  hur_info$zcta_closest_dist <- pmap(hur_info, function(track, zctas_sf, ...) {   calc_closest_dist(track, zctas_sf, geoid = "geoid") })

title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance and Wind
code: hur_info$tract_anderson_wind <- pmap(hur_info, function(hurdat, tracts_sf, ...) {   calc_anderson_wind(hurdat, tracts_sf) })  hur_info$zcta_anderson_wind <- pmap(hur_info, function(hurdat, zctas_sf, ...) {   calc_anderson_wind(hurdat, zctas_sf) })

what: Join output and write to file
title: Large Hurricane Analysis - Distance and Wind
text: End Time
code: pwalk(hur_info, function(tract_closest_dist, tract_anderson_wind, hurricane, ...) {   full_join(tract_closest_dist, tract_anderson_wind, join_by(geoid)) %>%     relocate(closest_date, .before = closest_dist) %>%     rename(highwind_datetime = datetime, closest_datetime = closest_date) %>%     write_csv(str_c("tract/", hurricane, "/distance_wind.csv")) })   pwalk(hur_info, function(zcta_closest_dist, zcta_anderson_wind, hurricane, ...) {   full_join(zcta_closest_dist, zcta_anderson_wind, join_by(geoid)) %>%     relocate(closest_date, .before = closest_dist) %>%     rename(highwind_datetime = datetime, closest_datetime = closest_date) %>%     write_csv(str_c("zcta/", hurricane, "/distance_wind.csv")) }) end_time <- Sys.time() cat("End time: ", end_time, "\n") cat("Duration: ", start_time - end_time, "\n")

text: daily_avgs Output calc_daily_avgs() closest_dist Output calc_closest_dist() days_before Number days closest distance (default 1) days_after Number days closest distance (default 2)
